signals.label: Price is unusually low for similar rentals
signals.why_it_matters: Extremely low prices are a common bait tactic in rental scams.
signals.evidence: This price is about 3.4 standard deviations below a small baseline.

topReasons: Price is unusually low for similar rentals
recommendedActions: Request a viewing and confirm the identity and authorization of the landlord or agent.
Never pay a deposit before you have verified the unit and agreed to written terms.
Prefer platform messaging and traceable payment methods after verification.
Do not share sensitive identity documents unless necessary and secure.
